description: Extra Tier-3 clinical keywords for the fast router. Edit offline and call POST /api/admin/fast-router/keywords/reload to apply without restart. Keywords are merged with the hardcoded baseline set in fast_router.py.
description_zh: 快速路由 Tier-3 扩展临床关键词。离线编辑后调用 POST /api/admin/fast-router/keywords/reload 即可热加载，无需重启。关键词与 fast_router.py 内硬编码的基础词集合并生效。

import_keywords.description: Keywords that trigger import_history intent — bulk document or past records imports.
import_keywords.description_zh: 触发导入历史意图的关键词，用于识别批量导入文档或过往病历的消息。

list_patients_exact.description: Exact phrases (after normalisation) that trigger list_patients intent. Add new variants here without restarting.
list_patients_exact.description_zh: 触发患者列表意图的精确短语（标准化后匹配）。可直接在此添加新变体，无需重启。

list_patients_short.description: Single-word messages that trigger list_patients when the entire message is exactly one of these.
list_patients_short.description_zh: 当消息完全等于这些词时触发患者列表意图的单词触发词。

list_tasks_exact.description: Exact phrases (after normalisation) that trigger list_tasks intent.
list_tasks_exact.description_zh: 触发任务列表意图的精确短语（标准化后匹配）。
keywords: 先看下我还有几个待办
先看下我今天待办事项

list_tasks_short.description: Single-word messages that trigger list_tasks when the entire message is exactly one of these.
list_tasks_short.description_zh: 当消息完全等于这些词时触发任务列表意图的单词触发词。

non_name_keywords.description: Domain keywords that must never be parsed as patient names in name-extraction patterns.
non_name_keywords.description_zh: 不能被解析为患者姓名的领域关键词，用于姓名提取模式的排除过滤。

tier3_bad_name.description: Words that match the name pattern (2-3 Chinese chars at message start) but are clinical terms, not patient names. Prevents Tier-3 from hallucinating patient names.
tier3_bad_name.description_zh: 看起来像姓名（消息开头2-3个汉字）但实为临床术语的词汇，防止 Tier-3 将其误识别为患者姓名。

cardinal_symptoms.description: Common presenting symptoms that almost always appear in clinical notes.
cardinal_symptoms.description_zh: 几乎总是出现在临床记录中的常见主诉症状。

cardiovascular.description_zh: 心血管系统疾病、症状与操作。

oncology.description_zh: 肿瘤诊断与抗肿瘤治疗。

lab_markers.description: Laboratory values and blood test markers used in clinical notes.
lab_markers.description_zh: 临床记录中常见的实验室检查项目与化验指标。

neurological.description: Neurological and cerebrovascular conditions, including Moyamoya disease, stroke, and visual field defects.
neurological.description_zh: 神经系统和脑血管疾病，包括烟雾病、脑梗及视野缺损等。

metabolic.description_zh: 代谢与内分泌系统疾病。

respiratory.description_zh: 呼吸系统症状与肺部疾病。

gastrointestinal.description: Gastrointestinal symptoms and digestive system diseases.
gastrointestinal.description_zh: 消化系统症状与胃肠道疾病。

infectious.description_zh: 感染性疾病与抗菌药物使用。

english_terms.description: English clinical abbreviations commonly used in Chinese doctor notes (mixed-language documentation).
english_terms.description_zh: 医生混合语言记录中常见的英文临床缩写。

other.description: Other high-confidence clinical terms that do not fit neatly into other categories.
other.description_zh: 不便归入其他分类的高置信度临床词汇。
